pagetext.p:
A few website have been created with Rivetweb
Rivet's website is a pure static HTML clone of a Rivetweb generated website.
A very interesting website about Biodiversity written in a cooperative work among students (in Italian).
A website delivering information concerning a Master of Science degree in Wildlife ecology, conservation, and management (in Italian)
Life Barbie is a EU sponsored project for the conservation and management of the Barbus meridionalis and Barbus plebejus in the Emilian tributaries of Po River
The International School of Ethology and International School of Neuroscience both affiliated to the E.Majorana Center for Scientific Culture
The website of the workshop The Symbolic Animal: Evolution and Neuroethology of Aesthetics
Needless to say, also this website was generated with Rivetweb
